summary: S008 did not require production code changes; source inspection showed remote-orphan governance summary/blocker and default-off stale remote cleanup behavior already existed.
The new focused test closes the proof gap by covering cleanup-disabled critical blockers, cleanup failure visibility, stale-job scan truncation, and recovery-batch pressure.
Existing server-executor coverage still proves stale remote cleanup is default-off and persists cleanup results when enabled.
review_gate: Production remote-orphan governance review: cleanup default-off safety, auditability, stale-session evidence, and operator-visible blockers.
